content: I will change the vacancy card rounding style to 5px and add the solid left brand border in `#533af6`.

args.Description: "Style vacancy list cards with 5px rounded corners and 6px left border in #533af6 in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Change card rounded-[2rem] to rounded-[5px] and add border-l-[6px] border-l-[#533af6] in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.ReplacementContent: "                              <div key={job.id || i} className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-[5px] shadow-sleek border border-slate-100 border-l-[6px] border-l-[#533af6] flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6 relative overflow-hidden\">"
args.TargetContent: "                              <div key={job.id || i} className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-[2rem] shadow-sleek border border-white/50 flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6\">"
